footer.vision:
Creating Willful Challenges.
Creating Globally Competitive Businesses.

hero.title: TRY to
hero.subtitle: Creating a Culture of Challenge.
description: Fusing the latest technology with overwhelming execution power
We go beyond the traditional advisory framework,
taking risks ourselves to manifest every challenge
as a next-generation business operating company.

whoWeAre.description:
We are not merely external advisors.
In addition to consulting fee-based contracts, we take business risks ourselves,
committing to results on the same level as our clients through revenue-share models and business investments.

This is exactly why our consulting embodies an overwhelming sense of ownership and real-world expertise gained from actual execution.
We do not offer "advice from those who have never done it," but rather "proposals from those who run businesses themselves".
This is our definitive value that completely sets us apart from ordinary consulting firms.

Today, as a true business operating company directly committed to the growth of our own businesses and investments, we generate new challenges every single day.

advisory.title: ADVISORY
advisory.desc:
Highly specialized intellectual services solving domestic and global business challenges.
We provide the foundational knowledge for every challenge, from M&A to corporate turnaround.

investment.title: INVESTMENT & OPERATION
investment.desc:
Investing our own capital and driving business through a hands-on approach.
We directly increase corporate value through the management of PE/PIPES/Infrastructure funds and principal investments.

ourPhilosophy.headline: Creating Willful Challenges.
ourPhilosophy.description:
We not only support the serious challenges of our clients but also possess a firm will ourselves, continuously acting as front-line "challengers" harder than anyone else.


Together with client business leaders, we Envision—painting an even higher vision and redefining the summit to aim for.
We then directly supplement the "missing parts" (capital, talent, technology, networks, etc.) essential for its realization, empowering them to pursue unprecedented scale in business growth.

trackRecord.description:
Over 14 years since our founding, we have covered a wide range of fields including strategic advisory, M&A advisory, expansion support to 58 countries worldwide, new business planning, DX/AI support, executive search, and cost reduction consulting.
Our track record of over 1,000 projects proves the overwhelming driving force of our hybrid model.

records.label: Total Portfolio Market Cap
records.description: Achieving overwhelming growth and value creation for consulting and portfolio companies.

records.label: Unicorn Creation
records.description: Nurtured into a unicorn company valued at over $1 billion through our consulting.

records.label: Infrastructure Fund
records.description: Total AUM in energy projects supporting social infrastructure globally and domestically.

records.label: PE/PIPES Fund
records.description: Managing growth and buyout investment funds for listed and unlisted companies.

uniqueValueProposition.description: Overwhelming execution power and commitment that sets us apart from ordinary consulting firms and investment funds.

cards.title: Taking 'Risk' as a Principal
cards.description: Going beyond standard advisory (fee-based business), we execute principal investments and revenue sharing ourselves. We commit to results directly, not as advisors, but as 'co-founders'.

cards.title: Powerful 'Missing Part' Supplementation
cards.description: We possess in-house capabilities to comprehensively procure and provide the resources missing for corporate growth—funding, management talent dispatch, global network access, DX/AI technology, and M&A execution. Rather than mere introductions, our professional group enters the field directly to fill the missing pieces and lead the business to completion.

details.value: Direct funding via fund management and principal investment
Immediate assignment of CxO-class management talent
Creating business opportunities using alliances in 58 countries
Design and implementation support for DX/AI and digital transformation

cards.title: A 'Powerful Network' Connecting the World
cards.description: Alliances and information networks spanning over 58 countries globally. We fully leverage these to discover and manifest opportunities for cross-border business growth. It is our unique foundation to realize global value-ups for both portfolios and clients.

valuesStrength.headline:
3 Value Behaviors
To Grow Businesses Together
valuesStrength.description: We are not merely external advisors. We share risks with our clients and commit to maximizing business value with an overwhelming sense of ownership.

on a Global Standard
cards.description: With a global perspective, we discover and realize opportunities for cross-border business growth.

and Executing as Principals

block1.headline: Creating Purposeful<br class="hidden md:block" />Challenges.
block1.p1: Turning 'we can do more' into conviction.<br class="hidden sm:block" />Our goal is a society where anyone can take the first step towards a challenge.
block1.p2: To continue tackling society's challenges, we ourselves operate as frontline challengers, driving new value creation.
block1.box_text:
We are never satisfied with the status quo and relentlessly pursue the enhancement of essential corporate value.

Going beyond mere planning, we dive deep into the business and drive execution hands-on. Unbound by past successes, we bring truly necessary transformation to society.

This is our mission.

block2.headline: Make Challenges a Culture.
block2.desc: As a true 'Business Operating Company' with a sense of ownership, we continually tackle problem-solving across all corners of society. Without being constrained by the means of advisory, we complement the necessary missing pieces ourselves and step into uncharted territories. Everything we do is to make the dramatic evolution born from genuine challenges a societal norm.

block3.headline: Creating World-Class<br class="hidden lg:block" />Businesses.
block3.desc:
Viewing business from a borderless perspective, we deliver results with overwhelming quality and speed.
Fearing no failure, we constantly ask 'How can we do this?'. Shoulder-to-shoulder with executives, through business investment and hands-on support, we implement the next generation of industrial models into society.

values.label: VALUES
values.headline: 3 Value Actions<br class="hidden md:block" />to Grow<br class="md:hidden" /> Businesses Together
values.desc: We are not mere external advisors. We share risks with our clients and commit to maximizing business value with an overwhelming sense of ownership.

cards.title: Pioneering Opportunities<br class="hidden md:block" />on a Global Standard
cards.desc: With a global perspective, we discover opportunities for cross-border business growth and turn them into reality.

cards.title: Challenging the Status Quo,<br class="hidden md:block" />Executing as Owners
cards.desc: Unbound by precedent or existing frameworks, we work alongside our clients through to business success with true ownership.

cards.title: Aiming for Uncharted Heights<br class="hidden md:block" />Through Teamwork
cards.desc: Diverse professionals converge to generate overwhelming results that exceed the mere sum of individual efforts.

leadership.label: TRYFUNDS 6 LEADERSHIP PRINCIPLES
leadership.desc:
These guiding principles serve not only as evaluation metrics but also as the core axis of feedback in our performance management cycle.
Alongside high-level skills, we elevate the 'mindset' essential for management talent through these six dimensions.

principles.title: Innovative Thinking
principles.desc: Do you grasp global trends and leverage information gathering and ideation to present next-level business opportunities and surprising solutions?

principles.title: Passion for Business
principles.desc: Do you rightly understand industry structures and possess the business conceptualization skills to maximize customer value, along with the plausible process design skills to see it through to completion?

principles.title: Ability to Involve Others
principles.desc: Do you have the reliability to gain individual cooperation from clients and internal teams, and the recruiting/procurement capability to define and approach necessary talent (collaborators/hires)?

principles.title: Pioneer's Soul
principles.desc: Do you lead by example with a sense of mission, and even in unknown territories, strive to create a domain of first-class expertise through self-improvement and learning?

principles.title: Immersive Action
principles.desc: Have you set the highest goals exceeding expectations, and do you demonstrate through action the tenacity to push through with a 'last-man-standing' mentality in any difficult situation?

principles.title: Resolve for the High Road
principles.desc: Do you face matters fairly and squarely under any pressure, sincerely accepting advice from others with objective self-awareness, and continuing to grow?

trackRecordPage.title: TRACK RECORD
trackRecordPage.desc:
Introducing our unique track record,
born from our commitment to the growth of our own businesses and investees.

header.label: BUSINESS DOMAINS
header.title: Driving Business Evolution<br class="hidden md:block" />Directly.
header.desc: Going beyond the traditional advisory framework, Tryfunds<br class="hidden md:block" />takes risks itself and drives corporate value enhancement as a business operator.

envision.label: THE TRYFUNDS MODEL
envision.title:
Envision &
Missing Parts Completion
envision.p1: At the core of our services is our unique business promotion model: "Envision (Redefining Goals)" and "Missing Parts Completion".
envision.p2: First, we work with our clients to draw up a powerful vision and strategy (Envision) aimed at reaching higher altitudes, rather than just an extension of the status quo.
envision.p3: Then, to make that extraordinary goal a reality, we directly supply and complement the missing elements: [Capital] [Talent] [Network] [Technology]. By spinning this cycle at high speed, we bring discontinuous growth to our clients.

fee.label: FEE STRUCTURE
fee.title:
Commitment to
Business Success
fee.p1: Tryfunds places importance on its position not just as an external advisor, but as a joint business operator. Even when we operate a business ourselves, we launch projects primarily when we are confident in achieving solid results.
fee.p2: Therefore, in order to show our dedication to moving in the same direction towards business success, we actively adopt contract formats that share a portion of the fruits of success.
fee.model1_desc: A performance-linked contract model where we receive the upside of business growth in the form of revenue share, profit share, or success fees, in addition to the basic man-month charge fee.
fee.model2_desc: In addition to the basic fee, we literally become "crew members on the same ship" with the client, engaging in hands-on support accompanied by capital participation through stock acquisition or SO (stock option) grants, depending on the project.

capabilities.label: CAPABILITIES
capabilities.title:
It's not about doing many things.
It's about doing everything necessary to win.
capabilities.desc: From strategy to execution, from finance to technology. We internalize all functions necessary for business growth and provide them seamlessly.

items.title: Investment & Incubation
items.subtitle: Principal Investment / Fund Management
items.description: We execute direct investments using our own capital and operate investment funds (PE/PIPES/Infrastructure funds) through our subsidiaries. Rather than mere asset management, we achieve dramatic corporate value enhancement for out investees through hands-on value-up utilizing our consulting knowledge.

items.title: Business Advisory & Strategy
items.subtitle: Management Strategy & New Business Consulting
items.description: We solve management issues by standing on the same level as the client's business leaders, armed with deep industry knowledge and execution capabilities. From launching new businesses to turnaround, we don't just formulate plans but intervene on the ground as stakeholders who "drive the business ourselves", committing strongly to results through revenue sharing and more.

items.title: M&A Advisory
items.subtitle: M&A & Partnership Support
items.description: We support non-organic growth strategies to fill "Missing Parts" in business strategy. Driving our unique domestic and international network, we execute seamlessly from M&A sourcing to PMI to maximize business synergies, going beyond mere matching.

items.title: Global Expansion
items.subtitle: Overseas Expansion Support
items.description: Based on our track record of supporting expansion into 58 countries, we strongly back the global challenges of Japanese companies. Leveraging our top-level network with local conglomerates and government agencies, we lead everything from market research to establishing local subsidiaries, cross-border M&A, and forming JVs with local partners.

items.title: Executive Search & HR
items.subtitle: Executive & Global Talent Headhunting
items.description: We swiftly complement the "talent" piece essential for a business breakthrough. We don't just stop at external procurement (RPO); if necessary, we directly dispatch CEO/COO-class personnel from our company. We support the construction of an organization that can run on its own, fundamentally lifting the client's execution capability.

items.title: Cost Reduction
items.subtitle: Large-scale Cost Reduction & Procurement Optimization
items.description: Going beyond BPR and DX, we achieve large-scale cost reductions by reformulating procurement strategies for materials and energy. We execute measures that directly lead to a dramatic improvement in profit margins by not only eliminating waste on the ground but radically reviewing the entire supply chain.

items.title: Marketing & PR Support
items.subtitle: Marketing & PR Support
items.description: We formulate and execute comprehensive marketing strategies to penetrate the market with superior technologies and services. From digital marketing to PR using mass media, we support the construction of optimal channels to maximize brand awareness and acquire customers.

cases.label: CASE STUDIES
cases.title: Track Record
cases.desc: Take a look behind the scenes at companies where Tryfunds has intervened and achieved discontinuous growth and dramatic value-up.

portfolio.label: INVESTMENT TRACK RECORD
portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.desc: Discover our portfolio companies from joint businesses with clients and principal investments through our own funds.

caseStudy.title: Materializing Earnest Challenges,<br class='md:hidden' />Together.
caseStudy.description:
Going beyond mere advisory, Tryfunds functions as a business operating company that shares the risks.
Discover stories of dramatic value creation, from launching startups to driving DX and corporate turnarounds for major enterprises.
caseStudy.ctaText: These are just a fraction of the over 1,000 projects we have undertaken.<br class='hidden md:block' />For detailed corporate information and past track records, please request our company document.

projects.title: Project Cases
projects.description: Our track record of value creation through the 'Hybrid Model,' cultivated over 14 years since our founding across more than 1,000 projects. We introduce diverse examples ranging from client support to our own new business launches.

cases.title: Cross-border M&A and Global PMI Support for a Major Manufacturer
cases.description: End-to-end support from strategy formulation to execution, including the dispatch of a local management layer.

members.headerDesc:
The management members driving the operations of Tryfunds Group.
Gathering talent with diverse, high-level expertise,
we materialzie earnest challenges together.
members.metaDesc: Introducing the professional members of the Tryfunds Group

jobs.goodFit: You may be a good fit if you have:
jobs.excitedApply: If you are excited by this role, we encourage you to apply!

top.title: JOIN OUR TRY
top.subtitle: Careers / Recruit
top.description: Tryfunds is looking for ambitious individuals to accomplish unprecedented businesses together.<br class='hidden md:block' />We offer an environment where you can experience tremendous growth and launch businesses on a global scale.

document.title: Download Pitch Deck
document.description: A recruitment pitch deck detailing salary structures, career paths, and specific project assignment examples.

casual.title: Casual Interview
casual.description: Let's start with a casual chat. Employees active in the field will directly answer your questions and consult about your career.

entry.title: Entry & Inquiry
entry.description: Please use this form to apply for the main selection process or for general inquiries regarding recruitment.

roles.subtitle: Open Roles
roles.title: Join Tryfunds
roles.description: We are recruiting for a variety of positions, from the CEO Office, which plays a central role in management, to advisory and fund management roles that leverage specific expertise.

header.subtitle: Persona
header.title: Mindset of an<br class='md:hidden' />Entrepreneur
header.description: Tryfunds is looking for individuals who not only possess consulting skills but also have an obsession with creating businesses from scratch and generating revenue. Here, we introduce the mindset we seek, the three phases of growth (Play/Drive/Lead), and the six leadership principles that form the core of our evaluations.

mindset.subtitle: PERSONA
mindset.title:
We are looking for
those with an
'Entrepreneurial
Mindset'.
paragraphs:
Tryfunds seeks talent with relentless determination to see things through to the end, regardless of the domain.
Our model is not sustained by consulting fees alone, but is built on a portfolio predicated on business revenue.
That is why we need individuals who have mastered strategy and finance as basic protocols, and who possess a tenacity to face numbers and drive profit.

must.title: Must
items: Ability to speak in numbers (Sales, Gross Profit, Collection, KPIs)
Self-driven capability to catch up (researching and advancing even in unknown fields)
Follow-through (taking responsibility to the very end)

niceToHave.title: Nice to have
items: Strengths in Strategy, Finance, or Investment
Experience in overseas projects or working in English
Experience in P/L responsibility at a business corporation or launching new businesses
Exceptional sales and marketing track record at a business corporation

negative.title: Not a Good Fit (Self-Screening)
items: Wanting to finish by just creating a beautiful proposal
Wanting to fix the coverage area (weak at cross-domain tasks)
Valuing an explanation of the process over actual results
Prioritizing stability over an obsession with numbers

header.subtitle: HR System & Expectations
header.title: HR System and Persona Match
header.description: At Tryfunds, we define members' growth phases in three stages: 'Play', 'Drive', and 'Lead'. We evaluate and develop based on six leadership principles, tied to respective ranks (MD, Principal, etc.). While we primarily look at 'results', we place the highest importance on 'performance improvement' through feedback, thoroughly forging not only consulting skills, but the mindset of management and business development professionals.

phases.name: Play
items: Can understand the client's essential challenges and propose impactful solutions via the shortest path.
Can continuously pursue self-improvement even in unknown territories, striving to become a leading expert.

phases.name: Drive
items: Can create and offer business models and new services that allow the target business to generate larger revenues.
Can take the lead in creating opportunities to challenge the unknown, inspiring and developing team members.

phases.name: Lead
items: Can create unprecedented businesses and services that bring transformation to society.
Can create an environment where everyone involved in Tryfunds has a dream they want to accomplish with their life.

principles.title: TRYFUNDS 6 LEADERSHIP PRINCIPLES
principles.description: These behavioral guidelines serve not only as evaluation metrics but also as the axis of feedback in our performance management cycle. Along with high-level skills, we elevate the 'mindset' indispensable for management personnel through these six axes.

items.title: Innovative Thinking
items.text: Can you grasp global trends and use your information gathering and ideation skills to present business opportunities and surprising solutions that are a step ahead?

items.title: Passion for Business
items.text: Do you have the business conception skills to accurately understand industry structures and maximize client value, alongside the process design skills with high probability of completion?

items.title: Ability to Involve People
items.text: Do you possess the reliability to gain the cooperation of clients and internal staff as an individual, and the recruiting and procurement skills to define and approach necessary talent?

items.title: Pioneer's Soul
items.text: Are you leading by example with a sense of mission, constantly attempting to establish a domain of expertise through continuous self-improvement and learning, even in unknown fields?

items.title: Absorbing Action
items.text: Have you set the highest optimal goals exceeding expected standards, showing through actions the 'last-man-ship' to follow through regardless of the difficulty of the situation?

items.title: Resolve to Take the High Road
items.text: Are you growing steadily by facing matters fairly under any pressure, and sincerely accepting advice from others with objective self-awareness?

header.subtitle: Careers & Philosophy
header.title:
True Career Path as a
Management Professional
header.description:
Are you satisfied with just being a highly-paid consultant, or will you elevate yourself to a management professional or fund manager who drives real business?
Through overwhelming professionalism and a 'hands-on grassroots' approach, Tryfunds develops absolute leader tiers capable of fighting in the real world.

flow.title: Play, Drive, Lead
flow.description: Through the three grades of Play, Drive, and Lead, members aim to elevate themselves to 'management professionals' who think and act on their own, lead teams, and ultimately bring transformation to business and society.

points: Understand the client's essential challenges and propose impactful solutions via the shortest path.
Continuously pursue self-improvement even in unknown territories, striving to become a leading expert.
Create and offer business models and new services that allow the target business to generate larger revenues.
Take the lead in creating opportunities to challenge the unknown, inspiring and developing team members.
Create unprecedented businesses and services that bring transformation to society.
Create an environment where everyone involved with Tryfunds has a dream they want to accomplish with their life.

philosophy.title: Street Smart
philosophy.subtitle: Adaptation to Street Smart
philosophy.description: Up to the Associate level, structured inputs and meticulous skill-up support are guaranteed. However, from the Senior Associate level and above, a complete departure from 'Book Smart' theories is required. In a modern era marked by rapid change and brief strategy lifespans, adopting new technologies and making swift decisions dictate success. We aim to be a group of 'Street Smart' individuals who, even in unknown business territories, build hypotheses on their feet, relentlessly hunt for answers, and possess the 'savvy' and 'practical sense' to survive in the real world.

philosophy.title: Dual Job: Consulting & Business
philosophy.subtitle: Breaking the Consulting Dilemma
philosophy.description: In typical consulting firms, as skills and compensation increase, the 'opportunity to challenge a business yourself' is often not provided, leading to a dilemma of high pay without the ability to operate a business. Tryfunds provides an environment to experience both hands-on intervention as our own business and pure client services. We grant irreversible experience that transcends consulting and leads to true business management.

philosophy.title: Commitment to P&L & Market Cap
philosophy.subtitle: Commitment to P&L and Market Cap
philosophy.description: Beyond fee businesses based on delivering value to clients, in hands-on business turnarounds and our own investment projects, the direct impact on vivid corporate value—namely 'improvement of P&L' and 'significant increase in market capitalization'—is most heavily emphasized. Whether one has taken risks, assumed responsibility, and delivered fruits to the actual business is all that is evaluated, and this real-world environment is what nurtures the next generation of management.

philosophy.title: True Management Power
philosophy.subtitle: True Management: Leading Diverse Talent
philosophy.description: Management within a firm where only homogeneous and excellent professionals gather is entirely different from management in a business corporation. To enter a business corporation and make it function, a gritty leadership that involves and motivates members with diverse or no specialized backgrounds to produce results is essential. On the frontlines of Tryfunds, you cultivate 'deep insight into humans' and 'capability to intervene deep in organizations' needed to read the minds of people on the ground and get them to work earnestly.

philosophy.title: Frontlines Forging Cash and Grit
philosophy.subtitle: The Frontline forging Cash and Grit
philosophy.description: What ultimately dictates the survival of a company is the real metric of 'Cash'. In addition to acquiring basic advisory skills, you will accumulate management experience including frontline sales, marketing, and rigorous cash flow management to actually achieve value-up in business corporations. We believe that those who possess the 'planning ability' and 'overwhelming grit' to face unknown challenges amid highly uncertain rough seas—and yet not run away but sustain the company—are the ones who will shape the next world.

compensation.title: Designing Limitless Returns Based on Business Revenue
compensation.description: In addition to a base salary aligned with consulting industry standards, we prepare 'limitless upside (incentives)' directly linked to results as a business operator or investor. Usually, incentives in a consulting firm are allocated based on total company revenues, and in PE funds, the distribution of carry fees is standard. At our company, we offer further incentive distributions to personnel who make an impact on P&L with business revenue. This system enables support genuinely aligned with the client. Moving forward, by accumulating business success incentives, we aim to return compensation on par with global PE funds.

items.title: Company-Wide Performance Bonus
items.desc: Annual bonus linked to company revenue. Paid to all eligible staff.

items.title: Special Incentive
items.desc: Partial return of portfolio business revenues and EXIT rewards.
items.badge: Target: Upper Drive Ranks and above

charts.title: Reward Image by Rank
charts.description: As rank increases, the ratio of limitless upside (incentives) is designed to jump dramatically.

items.note: *Upper Drive and above are incentive eligible

content.p1: We do not aim to create 'highly specialized consultants' with strengths in specific areas. In a fast-paced era, we aim to develop 'true business leaders' who can make management decisions and construct operations from multifaceted perspectives such as global trends, finance, and technology. In this respect, we radically differ from existing fragmented competing consulting firms.
content.p2: By engaging them on a practical level in services that directly complement a corporate's missing parts (procurement of funds, talent recruitment, the cultivation of global networks) beyond the scope of consulting duties, and in operations generating their own revenue (sales, marketing, alliance building), they are forged into human resources that possess overwhelming combat power in the field.

cases.title: Promotion to Management & Fund Managers in as little as 3 years
cases.description: Tryfunds' biggest feature is the rapid pace of growth and the subsequent vastness of career opportunities. We prepare paths connecting you to appointment as our firm's business management or fund manager in as little as three years. Regardless of age or tenure, we provide tremendous opportunities to challenge.

list.title: Promoted to Fund Manager in Year 4
list.text: Evaluated on overwhelming delivery track records in the strategic consulting department and the result of personally leading the discovering and closing of new investment projects, taking the post of manager of an internally operated fund at the unprecedented speed of four years after joining.

list.title: Youngest Selection for CXO of Investee Business
list.text: After serving as Engagement Manager for several projects in the consulting department, elevated to the CEO tier of a group company in the AI tech sector, valued for deep knowledge of that technology and strong commitment. Becoming a model case embodying spin-offs & unicorn creation within the group.

manifesto.p1:
Once, Japan stood at the center of the world.
Referred to as 'Japan as Number One', it drove the era with its economy and technology.
Later, its culture earned global acclaim as 'Cool Japan', drawing the world's attention.
manifesto.p2:
However, how is Japan viewed today?
A country of maturity, stagnation, and risk aversion.
Remaining on an extension of past success experiences,
a presence taking a step back from global competition.
manifesto.p3: It is often spoken of in such ways.
manifesto.p4: But that is not the essence.
manifesto.p5:
Japan still possesses world-class technology.
Overwhelming frontline capabilities (Genba power).
An accumulation of meticulous thinking and execution.
And without a doubt, companies and individuals with the potential to compete globally exist.
manifesto.p6:
What is lacking is not capability.
It is will (意志).

And a structure to turn that will into reality.
manifesto.p7:
There are people with the resolve to win globally.
However, the functions to support that TRY with strategy, capital, organization, and implementation are insufficient.
Passion alone cannot win in the global market.
Without a structure, TRYs cannot be sustained.
manifesto.p9:
We do not leave TRYs to chance.
We transform will into strategy,
accelerate strategy with capital,
and design organizations equipped for execution.
manifesto.p10:
Sometimes as investors,
sometimes as partners,
sometimes diving into the field as CxOs,
we take responsibility for results.
manifesto.p11:
We don't just talk about aspirations;
we build globally winning companies together.
manifesto.p12:
What we aim for is,
not mere consulting, nor mere investment.
manifesto.p13:
It is producing talent that fights on global standards,
and creating companies that win on global standards.
manifesto.p14:
Japan still holds potential.
Unpolished talent.
Unstructured intellect.
A will capable of changing the world.
manifesto.p15:
Turning that will into a TRY.
Turning that TRY into victory.

mission.text:
Never leave a TRY solitary.
Make the TRY reproducible.
Structure the TRY.

Turning Ambitions into Value.
mission.sub: That is the mission of Tryfunds.

items.title: Discovering and Re-growing 'Hidden Assets' across Japan
items.description: Countless 'hidden assets' with world-class potential still exist across regions in Japan. High-quality agricultural and marine products nurtured by unique climates, traditional crafts passed down through generations, and the absolute pinnacle of niche top technologies held by regional SMEs. These are not merely local curiosities; they possess solid competitive advantages capable of fighting in the global market. We unearth these buried assets and, by combining them with strategy, capital, and the latest technology, stimulate robust re-growth, elevating them into global businesses that win on the world stage.

items.title: Development of Authentic Regional Assets
items.description: Japan breathes a unique history, culture, and natural foundation unparalleled in the world. However, much of it fails to exert its true value due to a lack of appropriate business models and marketing strategies. We redefine unexplored tourism resources and idiosyncratic cultural backgrounds, designing them not just to harvest inbound demand but as high-value-added experiences. While preserving the authenticity of regions, we create 'world-standard destinations' that become sustainable revenue bases.

items.title: Discontinuous Business Development Leveraging Existing Strengths
items.description: In an era where rapid changes in the external environment and technological evolution cause traditional business models to become rapidly obsolete, the 'expiration date of a business' is brought into question. Without breaking away from past success experiences and boldly restructuring the business portfolio, a company's survival is endangered. We identify the 'true core competencies' (technology, customer base, brand, etc.) accumulated over many years, hands-on execute discontinuous business development to divert them into entirely new markets and growth areas, powerfully driving a second founding.

items.title: Growth Investment to Overcome Penny Stocks
items.description: In Japan, numerous listed companies possess excellent technologies and services but fail to embark on overseas expansion or business development in peripheral areas due to a shrinking domestic market or lack of management resources. As a result, market capitalizations languish, failing to reflect true potential. We directly inject our own capital and professional talent into these listed companies. By complementing the 'missing parts' of management and taking the lead on bold global expansion and M&A, we realize drastic transformations of business models and significant enhancements of market capitalization (Value Up).

items.title: Updating Society and Creating Startups to Compete Globally
items.description: Irreversible social challenges facing Japan—population decline, super-aging, and aging infrastructure—are conversely massive 'market opportunities' to be solved precisely through technology and new business models. We generate innovation starting from solving these challenges (updating society), launching businesses from scratch. Furthermore, by polishing these businesses in Japan—the 'advanced-challenge nation'—and deploying them to global markets facing similar issues, we cultivate independently growing mega-ventures capable of truly competing globally.
